narrative:
Canaan Township has 1,138 registered voters, with 48.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 38.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 24.8 percentage points.
